lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Gilbert!

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Hey, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The meadow is looking lovely!

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: I know! It didn't always look like this though. It used to be dull and grey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Dull and grey? How did it become so colourful?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: An adventurer came along and helped me out. We cast a magic spell using flower seeds, and it created this lovely sunburst!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'd have liked to have seen that spell. It sounds impressive!

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: It was! The news travelled far. I've been getting lots of visitors. Many flower traders from across the lands have paid the meadow a visit.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: I know! Thank you again for your help with it. It fills me with happiness to see so much colour.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: I've been getting lots of visitors too. Many flower traders from across the lands have paid the meadow a visit.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: I've even traded with a few for some new flower seeds with different colours!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's really cool. What do you do with all the flowers?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: I make flower crowns in many different colours. I'm wearing one right now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds very colourful!

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: You're welcome to have one if you'd like, just come back and ask me, anytime!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you. I might do just that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: New flower seeds? What types?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Well as you may have noticed, you can change the colours of the flowers on your flower crown now!

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Turns out the spell we cast was more powerful than we first thought.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: So powerful that it made eight new colourations, all as beautiful as the first!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's amazing! And all because we wanted a little splash of colour.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Don't underestimate the power of a little splash of colour!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll make sure not too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything happening around here?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Lots of things! It's been pretty busy. There was even a huge colourful parade with thousands of people, and they chose this meadow as the starting place!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know, I was there!

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: You were? I didn't see you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was super crowded. I was the one in the colourful outfit.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: The one in the colourful outfit...?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, yes, like everybody else. I forgot, we were all in colourful outfits!

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Yes! Did you have a good time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did thank you. It was really nice to see so many adventurers coming together to bring a splash of colour to Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: It truly was, and so many flower crowns too! I was a bit worried the large pile I'd made of them would go to waste, but in the end I almost ran out!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? That's cool! What made it colourful?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Everyone turned up in colourful outfits, it was like a sea of rainbows.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: So many flower crowns too! I was a bit worried the large pile I'd made of them would go to waste, but in the end I almost ran out!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like a nice problem to have! Will you be making more for the next parade they do?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: The next parade?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm sure they'll do another one. If so many people turned up, it must have been a great success. Why wouldn't they want to do it again?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: That is a good point. I'll get to making some more right away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe it'll become a yearly thing. A chance to show off some colour, and of course your fancy flower crowns, to all of Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Sounds good to me, gives me time to get lots made in advance.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Right, well I clearly have work to be getting on with. See you soon!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How’s the Glade coming along?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: We are currently scouting locations for it. I have a good idea of the kind of place I’m looking for, and I hope we can find it soon. I’ll let you know if we need your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any rainbow items I can claim?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Absolutely! I have a cape, shirt, jumper, flower crown and scarf for you. Which would you like?

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: You should have all of the old rainbow items now!

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Oh, you appear to already have one of those.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Oh, you appear to already have one of those.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Oh, you appear to already have one of those.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Oh, you appear to already have one of those.

lines.speaker: Gilbert
lines.text: Oh, you appear to already have one of those.
